allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Kade\\Work\\excel-migration-app-clean\\frontend\\.output\\server\\chunks" -Recurse | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object Name, FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/health" -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response }; if \($r\) { "STATUS=" + [string]$r.StatusCode; "CT=" + [string]$r.Headers['Content-Type'] } else { "No response" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/import-sessions" -MaximumRedirection 0 -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer test-token"} -ErrorAction Stop } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response }; if \($r\) { "STATUS=" + [string]$r.StatusCode; "CT=" + [string]$r.Headers['Content-Type'] } else { "No response" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/import-sessions" -MaximumRedirection 0 -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer test-token"; 'Accept'='application/json'} -ErrorAction Stop } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response }; if \($r\) { "STATUS=" + [string]$r.StatusCode; "CT=" + [string]$r.Headers['Content-Type']; $body = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($r.RawContentStream.ToArray\(\)\); "BODY_START=" + $body.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(150, $body.Length\)\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/import-example-template.xlsx?entity_type=deal" -MaximumRedirection 0 -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer test-token"} -ErrorAction Stop } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response }; if \($r\) { "STATUS=" + [string]$r.StatusCode; "CT=" + [string]$r.Headers['Content-Type'] } else { "No response" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "https://evilly-universal-skate.cloudpub.ru/api/import-example-template.xlsx?entity_type=deal" -MaximumRedirection 0 -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer test-token"} -ErrorAction Stop } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response }; if \($r\) { "STATUS=" + [string]$r.StatusCode; "CT=" + [string]$r.Headers['Content-Type']; if \($r.RawContentStream\) { $body = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($r.RawContentStream.ToArray\(\)\); "BODY=" + $body.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(150, $body.Length\)\) } })

PowerShell(docker inspect excel-migration-app-clean_internal-net --format '{{json .Containers}}' 2>&1 | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(v['Name']\) for v in d.values\(\)]" 2>&1)
